## Description

Briefly describe the changes in this PR and the motivation behind them.

## Related issue

Closes #(issue number) or Links to #(issue number)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing

Describe the testing you performed:

- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] Manual testing completed (describe what was tested)
- [ ] No new tests needed (explain why)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] No new console warnings or errors have been introduced
- [ ] Changes do not break any existing functionality
- [ ] Documentation has been updated accordingly

## Browser/environment compatibility

- [ ] Chrome
- [ ] Safari
- [ ] Firefox
- [ ] Mobile browsers
